author: Jordan Conradson
title: ZINGER! Nancy Mace Slams RINO Adam Kinzinger Amid Restroom Controversy: "Even Though You Don’t Have Balls Anymore, You Can Still Use The Men’s Room" | The Gateway Pundit | by Jordan Conradson
text: As The Gateway Pundit reported , Mace introduced a resolution earlier this week to ban biological males from using women’s bathrooms and other female-only facilities on Capitol Hill. Mace later confirmed that the resolution is in response to Tim “Sarah” McBride’s election to the House as the first male “congresswoman,” and leftists like Adam Kinzinger lost their minds. The Biden-supporting RINO posted a screenshot of an old tweet from Mace, where she declared her support for LGBTQ rights while still noting that “we have to ensure anti-discrimination laws don’t violate religious freedom.” Embedded in her post from 2021 is a story from the Washington Examiner where Mace explains her vote against the Democrats’ Equality Act, a bill that added sexual orientation and gender identity as protected classes with no exceptions for religious institutions. There was no change in her stance, as implied by Kinzinger’s post. This was just an attempt at an irrelevant jab. And she made him pay! “It’s ok Adam, even though you don’t have balls anymore, you can still use the men’s room,” Mace responded. — Nancy Mace (@NancyMace) November 21, 2024 This comes after House Speaker Mike Johnson announced on Wednesday that no biological males will be permitted to use female restrooms. Rep. Nancy Mace recently told The Gateway Pundit that she’s “not going to stop with Capitol Hill.” “I’ll be filing multiple bills to protect women and girls all across the country,” said Mace. EXCLUSIVE: “I’m Not Going to Stop with Capitol Hill” – Rep. Nancy Mace Speaks to The Gateway Pundit About Resolution to Ban Men From Using Women’s Bathrooms and Changing Rooms on Capitol Hill and Ensuing Death Threats (VIDEO) This is despite receiving death threats from deranged men who think they're women. Finally, we have a hero willing to stand up to this garbage and exhibit fearlessness in the face of hateful rhetoric and even death threats from radical leftists.
